name: pokieticker
description: Query PokieTicker for stock tickers, OHLC, news, categories, and ML forecasts.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (e.g. AAPL). Required for ohlc, news, news_range, news_categories, forecast, prediction, backtest, similar_days, story, range_local, fetch_data, process_data.

date.description: Trading date YYYY-MM-DD. Used by news (filter by date) and similar_days (reference date).

start.description: Start date YYYY-MM-DD for ohlc or news_range.

end.description: End date YYYY-MM-DD for ohlc or news_range.

window.description: Forecast window in days (3-60, default 7) for forecast.

horizon.description: Prediction horizon for prediction and backtest.

top_k.description: Number of similar days to return (1-30, default 10) for similar_days.

full.description: For update_data: true = full fetch (all history), false = incremental (default).

batch_size.description: For process_data: max articles to process per symbol (default 1000).

top.description: For submit_layer1: top N tickers to include (1-200, default 50).

batch_id.description: For batch_status: Anthropic Batch API job id (returned by submit_layer1).
